system_overview.description: The Autonomous Office Protocol is designed to simplify workflow and decision-making processes by automating task allocation, workflow management, and feedback loops.

components.name: Autonomy Engine
components.description: Core module controlling task assignment, workflow management, and feedback loops

components.name: Knowledge Graph
components.description: Database storing project insights, decisions, and learning outcomes

components.name: Collaboration Tools
components.description: Integrated platforms for real-time communication and updates

data_models.name: Task
data_models.description: Represents a task to be completed by a team member.

data_models.name: TeamMember
data_models.description: Represents a team member with skills and workload.

data_models.name: Decision
data_models.description: Represents a decision made by the Autonomy Engine.

data_models.name: LearningOutcome
data_models.description: Represents the outcome of machine learning algorithms.

api_endpoints.description: Make a decision using the Autonomy Engine
Retrieve a list of learning outcomes

open_questions.question: How will we handle task conflicts when multiple team members attempt to complete the same task?
What machine learning algorithms will we use for task allocation and decision-making?
How will we ensure data privacy and security in the Knowledge Graph?
